summary: Switched both store Open paths from mattn-style _journal_mode/_busy_timeout/_foreign_keys underscore DSN params to modernc's _pragma=name(value) form (file: prefix).
reason: modernc.org/sqlite silently ignores the underscore params (verified: journal_mode stayed 'delete', foreign_keys 0, busy_timeout 0), so WAL, busy timeout, and FK enforcement were never applied.
validated_outcome: Empirical probe shows journal_mode=wal, foreign_keys=1, busy_timeout=5000 with the _pragma form; mode=ro still blocks writes.
